zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Mallory於1358年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾比可萊頓時，她的父親John Mallory39歲，母親Marjory de Willoughby31歲。她於1374年與Walter Everard在英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1425年在英國艾可馬申波利享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Mallory于1358年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾比可萊頓时，她的父亲John Mallory39岁，母亲Marjory de Willoughby31岁。她于1374年与Walter Everard在英国英格兰艾可馬申波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1425年在英国艾可馬申波利享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Mallory was born in 1358, in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, her father, John Mallory, was 39 and her mother, Marjory de Willoughby, was 31. She married Walter Everard in 1374, in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1425, in Mashbury, Essex, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Mallory est née en 1358, à Peckleton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Mallory, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Marjory de Willoughby, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Everard en 1374, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1425, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Mallory 1358 in Peckleton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Mallory 39 und ihre Mutter Marjory de Willoughby 31. Sie hat 1374 in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom Walter Everard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1425 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Mashbury, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mallory è nata il nel 1358 nel Peckleton, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, John Mallory, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Marjory de Willoughby, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Walter Everard nel 1374, nel Mashbury, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1425, nel Mashbury, Essex, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Malloryが1358年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアペックレトンで生まれた時，父John Malloryは39歳，母Marjory de Willoughbyは31歳であった。1374年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマシュブリーでWalter Everardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1425年にイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mallory(이)가 1358년 영국 레이스스터실르 펙레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mallory(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory de Willoughby(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 마쉬버이에서 Walter Everard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 에세스 마쉬버이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mallory nasceu em 1358, em Peckleton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Mallory, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Marjory de Willoughby, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Everard em 1374, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1425, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Mallory родилась в 1358 г. в местности пекклетон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Mallory было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory de Willoughby, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Everard в 1374 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1425 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Mallory nació en 1358, en Peckleton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Mallory, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Marjory de Willoughby, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Walter Everard en 1374, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1425, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
